packetManifest.title: autoresearch-pipeline first-party experiment receipt corpus source packet
packetManifest.scope: Represents the public experiment receipt corpus of hummbl-dev/autoresearch-pipeline as a single first-party source. Covers program.md, results.tsv, and docs/experiment_receipts/*.md through Pack 2 (34 governed experiments, 2 kept patches). Does not assert that findings generalize beyond the 26M-parameter / short-training regime, does not promote any kept patch into canon, and does not cover the private founder-mode runtime that produced the corpus.

provenance.method: Manual capture of public repository artifacts at main commit f39a3eec3a24a02c1e11d421d5752953e49d10db. Inspected program.md, results.tsv (243 data rows), docs/experiment_receipts/ (9 receipt docs), and merged PRs #14 through #25.

edges.note: 34 governed experiments with hypothesis, baseline, noise floor, measured outcome, and KEEP/DISCARD decision recorded per experiment.
32 of 34 governed experiments were DISCARD. Negative results are preserved in results.tsv and per-wave receipt docs, not silently dropped.
Two seed-repeat control experiments (PR #16, PR #18) measured noise floors of 0.180 (untuned) and 0.005 (tuned) before authorizing any architecture experiment.
Pack 2 nanochat frontier port (PR #24) tested 5 frontier-feature patches at 26M scale; all 5 were DISCARD. Receipt docs annotate scale thresholds for each idea pack.
Candidate downstream paper hummbl-papers#14. Packet is candidate-only; the paper must not promote findings beyond the 26M/short-training regime without replication.

onAccept: Record the packet id, schemaVersion, and source repository URL.
Record the capturedAt timestamp and the main commit the packet was captured from.
Record that negative results (32 of 34 DISCARD) are first-class evidence, not appendix material.
Record that the 26M-parameter / short-training scope is a hard boundary; do not generalize without replication.
onReject: Record the packet id and the reason for rejection.
Record whether rejection was caused by corpus completeness, provenance, evidence grade, or scope boundary.
onCite: Cite the underlying autoresearch-pipeline repository and the specific PRs or receipt docs referenced, not this packet.
Preserve the packetStatus and authority.posture as candidate in any derivative artifact.
Do not assert that kept patches (BATCH 2x, BATCH 2x 10min) generalize beyond the 26M / short-training regime.
Do not present the corpus as a benchmark; it is a governed experiment receipt substrate, not a leaderboard.
